creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: makc
Date: Fri Sep 21 22:24:49 2012
New Revision: 304643
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304643

Log:
  Add new port x11/lxrandr:
  
  LXDE screen manager.
  
  PR:		ports/171652
  Submitted by:	Eric Turgeon <ericturgeon.bsd at gmail.com>

Added:
  head/x11/lxrandr/
  head/x11/lxrandr/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/x11/lxrandr/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/x11/lxrandr/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/x11/lxrandr/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/x11/Makefile   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/x11/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11/Makefile	Fri Sep 21 22:23:22 2012	(r304642)
+++ head/x11/Makefile	Fri Sep 21 22:24:49 2012	(r304643)
@@ -190,6 +190,7 @@
     SUBDIR += lxde-meta
     SUBDIR += lxmenu-data
     SUBDIR += lxpanel
+    SUBDIR += lxrandr
     SUBDIR += menu-cache
     SUBDIR += metalock
     SUBDIR += metisse

Added: head/x11/lxrandr/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/x11/lxrandr/Makefile	Fri Sep 21 22:24:49 2012	(r304643)
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	lxrandr
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.2
+CATEGORIES=	x11
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/lxde/LXRandR%20%28monitor%20config%20tool%29/LXRandR%20${PORTVERSION}
+
+MAINTAINER=	ericturgeon@ghostbsd.org
+COMMENT=	LXDE screen manager
+
+USE_GNOME=	gtk20
+USE_GMAKE=	yes
+GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+USE_GETTEXT=	yes
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
+USE_XORG=	xrandr
+CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include ${PTHREAD_CFLAGS}
+LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib ${PTHREAD_LIBS}
+
+MAN1=		lxrandr.1
+
+post-install:
+	@-${LOCALBASE}/bin/update-desktop-database > /dev/null
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/x11/lxrandr/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/x11/lxrandr/distinfo	Fri Sep 21 22:24:49 2012	(r304643)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (lxrandr-0.1.2.tar.gz) = fb8139478f6cfeac6a2d8adb4e55e8cad099bfe2da7c82253c935ba719f9cf19
+SIZE (lxrandr-0.1.2.tar.gz) = 230394

Added: head/x11/lxrandr/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/x11/lxrandr/pkg-descr	Fri Sep 21 22:24:49 2012	(r304643)
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+LXRandR is the standard screen manager of LXDE. It manages screen
+resolution and external monitors.  You can plug in another screen
+into LXDE or choose to use a big screen projector. Local screen and
+extenal screen can be used at the same time. LXRandR configures the
+screen solution automatically.
+
+WWW: http://wiki.lxde.org/en/LXRandR

Added: head/x11/lxrandr/pkg-plist

+++ head/x11/lxrandr/pkg-plist	Fri Sep 21 22:24:49 2012	(r304643)
